contentBriefs.title: AI Challenge Content
contentBriefs.summary: Videos featuring AI controlling real-life decisions perform 3x average. Key elements: stakes, unpredictability, personal narrative.

contentBriefs.title: 1000-Year Minecraft Civilization
contentBriefs.summary: ZMDE's signature format: time-compressed civilization simulations with villagers. Time-scale (1000 years) + stakes + progression drives massive views.

contentBriefs.title: Money Experiment Documentaries
contentBriefs.summary: Following real money experiments with specific dollar amounts creates credibility and investment.

contentBriefs.title: Thief Bait Pranks
contentBriefs.summary: StevenSongIRL's breakthrough format: baiting thieves with high-value fake items. Justice narrative + stakes + real reactions = viral gold.

contentBriefs.title: Trash to Treasure Builds
contentBriefs.summary: Transforming cheap/trash materials into high-value items. Value transformation narrative is highly shareable.

contentBriefs.title: Extreme Price Comparisons
contentBriefs.summary: $1 vs $1000+ comparisons create natural curiosity gaps. Works best with high-stakes categories (cars, electronics).

contentBriefs.title: What-If Simulation Content
contentBriefs.summary: Pose dramatic 'what-if' questions using game mechanics. Cosmic/large-scale scenarios perform best.

topPatterns: Thief bait pranks with high-value items (7M+ views potential)
